title: mollugo molluginea
intro: Mollugo molluginea, also known as carpetweed or Indian chickweed, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the family Molluginaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mollugo molluginea include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or topical creams, and it can also be consumed as a dietary supplement.
